title: Price Increases for Gasoline and Petrol Reported Amid US-Iran Tensions
description: Recent reports indicate rising fuel costs. CTV News, Financial Post, and Al Jazeera cover the impact of US-Iran tensions on gas and petrol prices.

sources.title: U.S. gas prices hit an average of $4 a gallon again as the U.S. and Iran launch attacks
US Gasoline Tops $4 a Gallon Again as Iran War Escalates
Petrol prices climb as US–Iran tensions disrupt markets

sections.heading: US Gasoline Prices
paragraphs: According to CTV News, U.S. gas prices have hit an average of $4 a gallon again. This report states that this is occurring as the U.S. and Iran launch attacks.
The Financial Post similarly reports that US gasoline has topped $4 a gallon again as the Iran war escalates.

sections.heading: Global Market Impact
paragraphs: Al Jazeera reports that petrol prices are climbing. The publication attributes this rise to US-Iran tensions disrupting markets.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: The keyword 'price' is trending in the CA region. Google Trends data indicates a search lower bound of 500 for this term, with a snapshot taken on July 20, 2026.

faq.q: What is the reported average price for gas in the US?
faq.a: According to CTV News and the Financial Post, U.S. gas prices have hit an average of $4 a gallon again.

faq.q: What factors are cited for the increase in petrol prices?
faq.a: Al Jazeera reports that petrol prices are climbing as US-Iran tensions disrupt markets.
